name: odinring-workspace
description: OdinRing - Smart NFC Ring Management Platform

scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run test:firebase && npm run seed
scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.kill:all: npm run kill:backend && npm run kill:frontend
scripts.restart: npm run kill:all && npm run start
scripts.restart:backend: npm run kill:backend && npm run start:backend
scripts.restart:frontend: npm run kill:frontend && npm run start:frontend
